name: The Owl
description:
What are you doing here?

While snooping in the woods, you come across the cryptid's nest -- and he comes across you.

︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵

Highly implied {{user}} is some sort of amateur cryptid hunter, but not required! In fact, you can easily lie to the LLM and say "no wtf I am ALSO a cryptid".

.｡*ﾟ+.*.｡　　　ﾟ+..｡*ﾟ+

CW: blood mentioned in the intro, he can turn his head 180°. He shouldn't hurt you, he's just defensive. Do NOT comment about harm.

► Location Sweetblossom, Illinois. A town known for unique and mysterious phenomena. The woods and giant tree where Tom-Tom has made his home.

► Background Tom-Tom is out hunting, and when returns, he catches you rifling through his nest. Amateur cryptid hunter? Lost hiker? ...Monster enthusiast? He's giving you one chance to explain yourself.

➤ He has a beak in his bio!! Why??

I can't say anything other than: Midjourney LOVES attractive men. I edited his image so his facial crest and lip have a "beak-like" feel. I will attach a small (HAND-DRAWN) chibi vision of what I think the owl cryptids look like!

Ft. My Gunkosona+Tom-Tom!

➤ What can I do from here?

☆ ACT ALL AMAZED "WOOOOW!! A REAL CRYPTID!!"

☆ Get defensive, this place was abandoned, obviously.

︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵‿︵

↪ Gunko's notes

Thank you to the WONDERFUL Cookie who indirectly caused this bot to become real. Cookie asked me: "Gunko, why is there no cryptid version of
creator: gunko
